zh.lifeSummary: 當John Calthorpe於大約1438年出生在英國諾福爾可考可索普時，他的父親Richard Calthorpe21歲，母親Margaret Ermingland35歲。他於大約1460年與Alice Catherine Astley在英國諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年8月22日之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾布拉肯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Calthorpe于大约1438年出生在英国諾福爾可考可索普时，他的父亲Richard Calthorpe21岁，母亲Margaret Ermingland35岁。他于大约1460年与Alice Catherine Astley在英国諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年8月22日之前在英国英格兰諾福爾可，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾布拉肯利。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Calthorpe was born about 1438, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Richard Calthorpe, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Ermingland, was 35. He married Alice Catherine Astley about 1460, in Melton Constable, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 22 August 1503, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Blakeney, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Calthorpe est né environ 1438, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Calthorpe, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ermingland, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice Catherine Astley environ 1460, à Melton Constable, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 22 août 1503, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Blakeney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Calthorpe um 1438 in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Calthorpe 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Ermingland 35. Er hat um 1460 in Melton Constable, Norfolk, England Alice Catherine Astley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 22. August 1503 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Blakeney, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Calthorpe è nato il circa 1438 nel Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Richard Calthorpe, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Ermingland, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Alice Catherine Astley circa 1460, nel Melton Constable, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 22 agosto 1503, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Blakeney, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Calthorpeが約1438年にイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペで生まれた時，父Richard Calthorpeは21歳，母Margaret Erminglandは35歳であった。約1460年にイギリスノーフォルクメルトン コンスタブルでAlice Catherine Astleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年8月22日以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブラケンエイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Calthorpe(이)가 대략 1438년 영국 노르폴크 콕소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Calthorpe(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Ermingland(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 영국 노르폴크 멜턴 콘스타블일에서 Alice Catherine Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 8월 22일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 블레이켄이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Calthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1438, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Calthorpe, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ermingland, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Catherine Astley aproximadamente 1460, em Melton Constable, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 22 de agosto de 1503, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Blakeney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Calthorpe родился около 1438 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Calthorpe было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ermingland, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Catherine Astley около 1460 г. в местности мелтон кунстабл, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 22 августа 1503 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности блеикини, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Calthorpe nació aproximadamente 1438, en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Calthorpe, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Ermingland, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alice Catherine Astley aproximadamente 1460, en Melton Constable, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 22 de agosto de 1503, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Blakeney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
